explanations.pt-br: Pergunta simples que nao precisa de reasoning.
explanations.en-us: Simple question that doesn't need reasoning.

explanations.pt-br: Com reasoning_effort=high, o modelo pensa demais.
Exemplo de thinking gerado: 100+ tokens para resposta de 5.

Comparison: GPT-4o would use ~10 total tokens.
